title: 2021 Press Releases
summary: This is a Federal Reserve website listing page containing links to all press releases issued during 2021, not a single archived document. The page aggregates dozens of disparate announcements including FOMC minutes, rate decisions, enforcement actions, banking applications, and regulatory guidance. No specific publication date is provided for this index page itself; the URL indicates 2021 content, making this approximately 4-5 years old.
key_points: This is a listing/index page, not a specific policy document or research paper
Contains links to 2021 FOMC minutes (November 2-3, September 21-22, July 27-28 meetings)
Contains links to discount rate meeting minutes from various dates in 2021
Lists numerous enforcement actions against banks and former employees
Includes banking application approvals (WSFS, Webster Financial, First Citizens, etc.)
Contains regulatory guidance items including crypto-asset policy initiatives, computer-security incident notification rules, and third-party risk management guidance
No single coherent macro catalyst or market structure event can be extracted from this listing
why_it_matters: Listing pages like this are not suitable for archival storage in a research database. The actual substantive content resides in the individual linked documents. This page provides navigation to 2021 Fed activity but cannot be used alone for RAG retrieval without accessing each specific press release.
notes: NON-ARCHIVEABLE: This is a listing/index page from the Federal Reserve website, not a specific policy document. Contains links to 2021 press releases only. No specific content can be extracted for market structure or macro catalyst research. Recommend crawling individual press releases from this index for actual archival material. Source is stale (2021 content). Source type listing_page per CORE RULE 6 guidance.
